'''jayuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jihobbyist|jihobbyist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jihobbyist|jihobbyist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jayuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæyirith|jæyirith]] || [[word:jæyirij|jæyirij]] || [[word:jæyirish|jæyirish]] || [[word:jæyiri|jæyiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jayuyuruth|jayuyuruth]] || [[word:jayuyuruj|jayuyuruj]] || [[word:jayuyurush|jayuyurush]] || [[word:jayuyuru|jayuyuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jayuruth|jayuruth]] || [[word:jayuruj|jayuruj]] || [[word:jayurush|jayurush]] || [[word:jayuru|jayuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jayufruth|jayufruth]] || [[word:jayufruj|jayufruj]] || [[word:jayufrush|jayufrush]] || [[word:jayufruf|jayufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jayuruthu|jayuruthu]] || [[word:jayuruju|jayuruju]] || [[word:jayurushu|jayurushu]] || [[word:jayuruku|jayuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jayuruth|jayuruth]] || [[word:jayuruj|jayuruj]] || [[word:jayurush|jayurush]] || [[word:jayuru|jayuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jayuruthul|jayuruthul]] || [[word:jayurujul|jayurujul]] || [[word:jayurushul|jayurushul]] || [[word:jayurukul|jayurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jayuruthuthu|jayuruthuthu]] || [[word:jayurujuju|jayurujuju]] || [[word:jayurushushu|jayurushushu]] || [[word:jayuruku|jayuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jayuruthun|jayuruthun]] || [[word:jayurujun|jayurujun]] || [[word:jayurushun|jayurushun]] || [[word:jayurukun|jayurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jayuruthuoro|jayuruthuoro]] || [[word:jayurujuoro|jayurujuoro]] || [[word:jayurushuoro|jayurushuoro]] || [[word:jayurukuoro|jayurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
